untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'springs' (dips below range low) and 'upthrusts' (spikes above range high) with specific retracement logic and multi-candle confirmation patterns. These require custom bar-by-bar pattern recognition logic (tracking range boundaries over N bars, detecting penetration and retracement within threshold candles) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators and simple operators. The signal also contains multiple [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders that lack concrete parameter values. Donchian channels approximate range detection but cannot replicate the full spring/upthrust confirmation sequence required.
translation_notes: Approximated using Donchian channels (dc_upper, dc_lower) to detect range breakouts with volume confirmation, but this does not capture the nuanced spring/upthrust retracement and multi-candle confirmation logic central to the original signal. A custom pattern recognition module would be required for proper implementation.
